image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Ever wondered how neurons send messages? It all starts with electrical spikes.
Context visual: These spikes trigger the release of chemicals called neurotransmitters.
Escalation visual: But how do these neurotransmitters know where to go?
Evidence visual: They travel across tiny gaps known as synapses!
Payoff visual: This chemical communication is essential for everything from movement to memory.
Cta visual: Curious about the brain? Follow for more insights into neuroscience!
